items.headline: Bull of the Day: Albemarle (ALB)
items.snippet: The company is valued at $15 billion and has a Forward PE of 10. The stock has Zacks Style Scores of "C" in Value and Growth, and "A" in Momentum. A Monster Quarter Albemarle reported Q1 EPS of $2.95, crushing the consensus estimate of $1.24 by 138%. Revenue of $1.43 billion topp

items.headline: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $205 From $264
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $211.44, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027, and

items.headline: Research Alert: Albemarle Corporation Posts Strong Q1 Beat On Lithium Recovery
items.snippet: CFRA: Albemarle delivered strong Q1 results with net sales of $1.43B (+33% Y/Y, 8.4% above consensus) and adjusted EPS of $2.95 vs. a loss of $0.18 in the prior year, beating consensus by $1.64. Adjusted EBITDA surged 148% Y/Y to $664M. The Energy Storage segment led recovery wit
